signals.headline: Heartland Co-op acquires Legacy Propane
signals.summary:
Legacy Energy Consulting announced the successful sale of Legacy Propane in Allison, Iowa, to Heartland Co-op, headquartered in Clive, Iowa.

The post Heartland Co-op acquires Legacy Propane first appeared on LP Gas .

signals.headline: F.W. Webb opens new facility in Queensbury
signals.summary:
F.W. Webb has opened a new store and warehouse in Queensbury, New York, replacing its former location on Highland Avenue.

The post F.W. Webb opens new facility in Queensbury first appeared on LP Gas .
